title: Amtech S4935 3.6m x 2.7m All-Purpose polythene dust Sheet
features: VERSATILE: This 3.6m x 2.7m all-purpose polythene dust sheet is ideal for protecting floors, carpets and furniture when decorating
RE-USABLE: With a 17 micron medium weight, it is waterproof and rot-proof and can be wiped down and re-used
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 3.6 x 2.7m ALL PURPOSE POLYTHENE DUST SHEET See more
